title: Mosaic Document v1
description: Canonical JSON form of a Mosaic document (mosaic-json). See docs/proposal.md, §3.

mosaic_version.description: Pins the document to a spec version. Renderers validate against the version they support.

id.description: Stable cross-regeneration identity. Matches the id= in the mosaic-jsx fence opener.

refs.description: Hoisted reusable subtrees. Referenced from descendants via directives.from:ref.

kind.description: Optional discriminator. Resolved from the registry by type if omitted.

type.description: PascalCase tag (Box, Card, Chart, …). Lowercase HTML tag names are rejected at parse time.

props.description: Validated against the per-type sub-schema in primitives.schema.json.

slots.description: Named child collections, indexed by slot name (e.g. Stat.trend, Disclosure.body).

key.description: Stable identity for list-child diffing. Models are coached to set this on repeating items.

from:expr.description: Derived value: a bounded expr(...) expression that recomputes when its inputs change. See docs/proposal.md §6.2.

if:show.description: Conditional render: a boolean expr(...) expression.

for:each.description: Repeater over a baked-in array, e.g. "filter(rows, r, r.price > minPrice) as row". The child subtree is instantiated once per item.

on:event.description: Event-name → action map (local state.* mutation or a named host intent). Permitted events per block are registry-defined.

from:ref.description: Inlines a subtree from the document's refs table.

ActionRef.description: Either a local state mutation (state.set / state.toggle, applied by Mosaic) or a host action - a named intent the host interprets (call a tool, ask the model, navigate). Mosaic never acts on a host action itself.

oneOf.description: Shorthand, e.g. "state.toggle('open')" or a host action name.

JsonLiteral.description: Anything JSON-compatible, plus the special { "$token": "color.bg" } form for host-token references.
